creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
When installing latest version (r335818) intallation fails on registering package:

===>   Registering installation for pkg-1.2.2
Applying[DISTVERSION] :C to "1.2.2"
Modifier pattern: ":(.)"
Modifier pattern: "\1"
Result[DISTVERSION] of :C is "1.2.2"
/usr/bin/env FORCE_POST="rmdir kldxref mkfontscale mkfontdir fc-cache  fonts.dir fonts.scale gtk-update-icon-cache  gio-querymodules  gtk-query-immodules  ldconfig  load-octave-p$
g  update-desktop-database update-mime-database  gdk-pixbuf-query-loaders catalog.ports  glib-compile-schemas" /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/pkg-1.2.2/pkg/pkg-static r$
gister -i /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/stage -m /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.metadir -f /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.PLIST.mktmp
Execute: '/usr/bin/env FORCE_POST="rmdir kldxref mkfontscale mkfontdir fc-cache  fonts.dir fonts.scale gtk-update-icon-cache  gio-querymodules  gtk-query-immodules  ldconfig  loa$
-octave-pkg  update-desktop-database update-mime-database  gdk-pixbuf-query-loaders catalog.ports  glib-compile-schemas" /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/pkg-1.2.2/pkg/pk$
-static register -i /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/stage -m /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.metadir -f /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.PLIST.mktmp'
+ /usr/bin/env 'FORCE_POST=rmdir kldxref mkfontscale mkfontdir fc-cache  fonts.dir fonts.scale gtk-update-icon-cache  gio-querymodules  gtk-query-immodules  ldconfig  load-octave$
pkg  update-desktop-database update-mime-database  gdk-pixbuf-query-loaders catalog.ports  glib-compile-schemas' /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/pkg-1.2.2/pkg/pkg-static
register -i /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/stage -m /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.metadir -f /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.PLIST.mktmp
error on line 5 at column 44: 'unfinished value', character: '

*** Failed target:  fake-pkg
*** Failed command: /usr/bin/env FORCE_POST="rmdir kldxref mkfontscale mkfontdir fc-cache fonts.dir fonts.scale gtk-update-icon-cache gio-querymodules gtk-query-immodules ldconfi$
 load-octave-pkg update-desktop-database update-mime-database gdk-pixbuf-query-loaders catalog.ports glib-compile-schemas" /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/pkg-1.2.2/pkg/$
kg-static register -i /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/stage -m /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.metadir -f /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.PLIST.mktmp
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg
Global:.ERROR_TARGET = fake-pkg
Applying[MAKE_PRINT_VAR_ON_ERROR] :@ to ""
Modifier pattern: "v"
Modifier pattern: "$v='${$v}'
"
Result[MAKE_PRINT_VAR_ON_ERROR] of :@ is ""

*** Failed target:  /tmp/ports/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/.install_done.pkg._usr_local
*** Failed command: cd /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg && make install-message run-depends lib-depends check-already-installed fake-pkg security-check
*** Error code 1
